products.name: US-D1
products.descriptor: 24 GHz all-weather radar altimeter for UAVs, 0.5–50 m range

evidence.snippet:
*   US-D1 is accurate no matter what altitude
*   US-D1 is a radar altimeter so it works in all weather
*   US-D1 is able to rely on itself
### Why Choose The US-D1 Radar Altimeter?

Frequency Band
24 GHz
Bandwidth
190 MHz
Minimum Operating Altitude
0.5 meters
Maximum Operating Altitude
50 meters
Altitude Precision

Is the US-D1 export controlled?
Ainstein components are ITAR free, and do not classify under the US Munitions List governed by the State Department. Our units ship from the US with an Export Control Classification Number (ECCN) of EAR99, No License Required. For export, our HS Tariff Code is 8526.10.0000.

products.name: O-79
products.descriptor: 4D imaging radar for autonomous ground vehicles, 0.2–20 m range

evidence.snippet:
### O-79: Vehicle Imaging Radar
The O-79 offers lidar-like image quality, paired with high reliability under bad weather and low light conditions that only radar systems can provide.
Ainstein’s Vehicle Imaging Radar even offers target classification, allowing for the distinguishing of vehicles vs. pedestrians, opening doors to unlimited possibilities for self-driving
[Request a Quote](https://share.hsforms.com/10jLTeawNQ5KwbgywvCL9pg4d1ye)

Specifications
Instrumented Range
0.2 ~ 20 m
Azimuth Field of View
±45°
Elevation Field of View
±30°
Cycle Time
66 ms
Max. # of Output Targets
Base: 10 Tracked Objects
Pro: 15 Tracked Objects
Radar Interface
Base: CAN
Pro: CAN and Ethernet
Dimension
115 × 141 × 51.5 mm
Downloads
Ainstein components are ITAR free.

unresolved_questions: I-79 (4D imaging radar, resource-0012) and K-77 (automotive long-range radar, resource-0013) product pages were skipped due to Browserless budget exhaustion; no corpus content exists for these two SKUs. Both are listed in the site navigation under the Auto product line.
OA-Lite and OA-Pro are classified as prototype based on waitlist-only CTAs and all downloads marked Coming Soon; readiness should be re-checked once product pages are re-crawled.
T-79 is flagged pre-FCC certification for evaluation purposes only; readiness should be re-verified after FCC certification status changes.

fetch_requests.reason: Product page for I-79 4D imaging radar was skipped due to budget exhaustion; needed to classify category, descriptor, readiness, NDAA, and Blue UAS for this SKU.
Product page for K-77 automotive long-range radar was skipped due to budget exhaustion; needed to classify category, descriptor, readiness, NDAA, and Blue UAS for this SKU.
